Library passes admit 2 people at $10 per person.
1.   Patrons must first acquire a valid  digital library pass at their participating library to receive this discount. 
2.   Purchase tickets online: https://www.icaboston.org/ 
Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
